source: eccodes 2.34.1 grib_get_data + grib_get. Oracle for DRS template 5.61 (grid_simple_log_preprocessing). eccodes re-encode of regular_latlon_surface.grib2 via `grib_set -r -s packingType=grid_simple_log_preprocessing`. All-positive field so preProcessingParameter = 0 (decode Y = exp(X)). Provenance in NOTICE.md.
